Down in the DM ""Down in the DM"" is a song by American rapper Yo Gotti. The song was released on October 27, 2015, as the lead single from his fifth studio album, ""The Art of Hustle"" (2016). The song was produced by Ben Billions and Schife. The song was officially credited as featuring Nicki Minaj on US charts due to her remixed version of the song. The song shifted 51,349 paid US downloads during the February 5–11 tracking period, and ranked as that week’s number 12 digital song. The arrival of the remix additionally soared streams for the song by 59% to 7.2 million, with Spotify leading with 38% of overall plays across streaming providers.
